title: Inconsistency when using window function and complex select with LEFT JOIN
description:
### What happens?

When following query is run on amd vs arm pod it gives inconsistent results on ARM pod - 

```sql
create table t1 as from 't1.parquet';
create table t2 as from 't2.parquet';

select
  MAX (IF (metric_a_1 is null OR flag_1 = false, '00_00', id)) OVER (partition by key_1) "max_id",
  CASE WHEN ((metric_a_6 > metric_a_2) OR ((metric_a_6 = metric_a_2) AND (metric_a_6 < metric_a_7))) THEN COALESCE(TRY_CAST((COALESCE(TRY_CAST(metric_a_1 AS decimal(38,10)), 0) + COALESCE(metric_b_1, 0) - COALESCE(TRY_CAST(metric_a_4 AS decimal(38,10)), 0)) AS decimal(38,10)), 0) ELSE 0 END calc_1,
  CASE WHEN ((metric_a_6 > metric_a_2) OR ((metric_a_6 = metric_a_2) AND (metric_a_6 < metric_a_7))) THEN COALESCE(TRY_CAST((COALESCE(TRY_CAST(metric_a_3 AS decimal(38,10)), 0) + COALESCE(metric_b_2, 0) - COALESCE(TRY_CAST(metric_a_5 AS decimal(38,10)), 0)) AS decimal(38,10)), 0) ELSE 0 END calc_2,
  CASE WHEN ((metric_a_6 < metric_a_2) OR ((metric_a_6 = metric_a_2) AND (metric_a_6 >= metric_a_7))) THEN COALESCE(TRY_CAST((COALESCE(TRY_CAST(metric_a_1 AS decimal(38,10)), 0) + COALESCE(metric_b_1, 0) - COALESCE(TRY_CAST(metric_a_4 AS decimal(38,10)), 0)) AS decimal(38,10)), 0) ELSE 0 END calc_3,
  CASE WHEN ((metric_a_6 < metric_a_2) OR ((metric_a_6 = metric_a_2) AND (metric_a_6 >= metric_a_7))) THEN COALESCE(TRY_CAST((COALESCE(TRY_CAST(metric_a_3 AS decimal(38,10)), 0) + COALESCE(metric_b_2, 0) - COALESCE(TRY_CAST(metric_a_5 AS decimal(38,10)), 0)) AS decimal(38,10)), 0) ELSE 0 END calc_4,

FROM t1 as a
LEFT JOIN t2 as b  ON (a.key_1 = b.key_2);
```

To verify inconsistency check for rows where ` calc_2 <> 0.0000000000` it would be different for AMD vs ARM. AMD is as expected.

Tried different combinations where there are multiple window functions with single CASE condition and vice versa. Issue surfaces when there is any window function and multiple CASE statements like above. 

Please note this behavior is witnessed in 1.3.0, till 1.1.3 it is working as expected. Have not verified 1.2.x yet.

### To Reproduce

```sql
select
  MAX (IF (metric_a_1 is null OR flag_1 = false, '00_00', id)) OVER (partition by key_1) "max_id",
  CASE WHEN ((metric_a_6 > metric_a_2) OR ((metric_a_6 = metric_a_2) AND (metric_a_6 < metric_a_7))) THEN COALESCE(TRY_CAST((COALESCE(TRY_CAST(metric_a_1 AS decimal(38,10)), 0) + COALESCE(metric_b_1, 0) - COALESCE(TRY_CAST(metric_a_4 AS decimal(38,10)), 0)) AS decimal(38,10)), 0) ELSE 0 END calc_1,
  CASE WHEN ((metric_a_6 > metric_a_2) OR ((metric_a_6 = metric_a_2) AND (metric_a_6 < metric_a_7))) THEN COALESCE(TRY_CAST((COALESCE(TRY_CAST(metric_a_3 AS decimal(38,10)), 0) + COALESCE(metric_b_2, 0) - COALESCE(TRY_CAST(metric_a_5 AS decimal(38,10)), 0)) AS decimal(38,10)), 0) ELSE 0 END calc_2,
  CASE WHEN ((metric_a_6 < metric_a_2) OR ((metric_a_6 = metric_a_2) AND (metric_a_6 >= metric_a_7))) THEN COALESCE(TRY_CAST((COALESCE(TRY_CAST(metric_a_1 AS decimal(38,10)), 0) + COALESCE(metric_b_1, 0) - COALESCE(TRY_CAST(metric_a_4 AS decimal(38,10)), 0)) AS decimal(38,10)), 0) ELSE 0 END calc_3,
  CASE WHEN ((metric_a_6 < metric_a_2) OR ((metric_a_6 = metric_a_2) AND (metric_a_6 >= metric_a_7))) THEN COALESCE(TRY_CAST((COALESCE(TRY_CAST(metric_a_3 AS decimal(38,10)), 0) + COALESCE(metric_b_2, 0) - COALESCE(TRY_CAST(metric_a_5 AS decimal(38,10)), 0)) AS decimal(38,10)), 0) ELSE 0 END calc_4,

FROM t1 as a
LEFT JOIN t2 as b  ON (a.key_1 = b.key_2);

```
All calc_x columns are inconsistent in AMD vs ARM.  row count where  ` calc_2 <> 0.0000000000`  can be used to verify the same

Data files present [here](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1pQtlLyeHao1HermgUJRe4JpYaUyveIVX)

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table_1 (id INT, metric_a_1 DECIMAL(38,10), metric_a_2 DECIMAL(38,10), metric_a_3 DECIMAL(38,10), metric_a_4 DECIMAL(38,10), metric_a_5 DECIMAL(38,10), metric_a_6 DECIMAL(38,10), metric_a_7 DECIMAL(38,10), flag_1 BOOLEAN, key_1 INT);
CREATE TABLE test_table_2 (key_2 INT, metric_b_1 DECIMAL(38,10), metric_b_2 DECIMAL(38,10));

SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN metric_a_1 IS NULL OR flag_1 = FALSE THEN '00_00' ELSE id END) AS max_id, CASE WHEN (metric_a_6 > metric_a_2) THEN COALESCE(CAST(metric_a_1 AS DECIMAL(38,10)), 0) ELSE 0 END AS calc_1 FROM test_table_1 AS a LEFT JOIN test_table_2 AS b ON (a.key_1 = b.key_2);
key_bug_features: Inconsistent results with window functions and multiple CASE statements
